proof.methodology: estimated locally from runtime behavior and baseline heuristic
methodology_chain: 1. runtime behavior logged (map called, memory queried, edit used, validate run)
2. baseline heuristic: raw file-read + re-derive + LLM-write equivalent tokens
3. actual = tokens observed from LLM provider or local counter
4. saved = baseline - actual (estimated; label shows 'estimated', not 'measured')
5. upgrade to 'measured' when provider usage arrives via: simplicio savings upgrade --run-id <id>
